findings.title: Explicit non-string/untrimmed transition claim branch is untested
Fixture parity is field-by-field, not a whole-object deepEqual against runtime output
Seven declared required_acceptance_gates are not individually asserted by the rp00 validator
Informational: from state is a constant, not read from the S08 result
Explicit non-string/untrimmed transition claim branch is untested
findings.evidence: Claude observed normalizeOptionalStateTransitionClaim rejects non-string, blank, or untrimmed state_transition_from/to values, while tests only covered invalid string transition names.
findings.recommended_action: Add assert.throws coverage for non-string and untrimmed explicit transition claims.
findings.resolution: packages/control-plane/test/service.test.js now covers state_transition_from: true and untrimmed state_transition_to, both requiring trimmed nonblank strings.

findings.title: Fixture parity is field-by-field, not a whole-object deepEqual against runtime output
findings.evidence: Claude observed the S09 fixture parity test and RP00 validator checked fields individually but did not assert runtime precheck output exactly matched fixture.precheck_result.
findings.recommended_action: Add one deepEqual of runtime precheck output versus fixture.precheck_result.
findings.resolution: packages/control-plane/test/service.test.js now deepEquals JSON-normalized precheckControlPlaneAIImplementationHandoffStateTransitionEnforcement(fixture S08 result) with the S09 fixture precheck_result.

findings.title: Seven declared required_acceptance_gates are not individually asserted by the rp00 validator
findings.evidence: Claude observed the S09 contract definition declared 24 required_acceptance_gates while the RP00 validator required only 17.
findings.recommended_action: Add the missing gate IDs to the validator loop, or trim the declared list to what is enforced.
findings.resolution: scripts/validate-rp00-control-plane-contract.mjs now requires handoff_context_ids_carried, acceptance_gate_ids_carried, synthetic_fixture_precheck_result_validates, no_runtime_route_created, no_service_logic_executed, no_product_state_writes, and implementation_handoff_not_drafted.

findings.title: Informational: from state is a constant, not read from the S08 result
findings.evidence: Claude observed state_transition_from is derived from the allowed-transition constant or explicit matching claim, with secondary_workflow_path_ready implied by a validated S08 allow_metadata_only result.
findings.recommended_action: No action required for this synthetic_metadata_state_transition_receipt_only stage; record the nominal nature of the transition for transparency.
findings.resolution: This subphase intentionally records a synthetic metadata-only state transition receipt. The construction inspection and adjudication state that the prior state is implied by a validated S08 secondary workflow path result and that no runtime state machine or product mutation is claimed.

review_summary: S09 correctly consumes the S08 secondary workflow path result, emits a frozen synthetic metadata-only state transition receipt from secondary_workflow_path_ready to state_transition_enforced, supports firm-level null Matter context, fails closed on wrong or missing S08 input, invalid transition claims, forbidden runtime/write/audit/AuthZ/review-bypass/real-data claims, and unknown claims, and preserves no-real-data/no-write/no-runtime/no-audit-write/no-handoff-draft/no-UI boundaries. No P0/P1/P2 and no production_ready blocker.
